taxonomy: Uragoga amicorum is a species of flowering plant in the family Icacinaceae. It is native to tropical Africa, specifically in the countries of Cameroon, the Republic of the Congo, and the Democratic Republic of the Congo. The classification of Uragoga amicorum places it in the kingdom Plantae, phylum Magnoliophyta, and class Magnoliopsida. Further classification also includes the order Icacinales, family Icacinaceae, and genus Uragoga. It is a relatively rare and understudied species within its genus.
